headlines.title: Falklands veteran hopes King can speak to Trump over US 'review' of UK's sovereignty claim
headlines.description: Simon Weston says reports the US is reviewing the UK's claim to the territory makes his sacrifice feel "irrelevant".

headlines.title: Katya Adler: Europe's Nato allies push back at reported US threat to Spain
headlines.description: On Friday morning, souring relations between Europe and the United States  reared its Medusa-like head again, writes the BBC's Europe editor.

headlines.title: I'm A Celebrity 'legend' crowned in heated live final
headlines.description: Adam Thomas, Craig Charles, Mo Farah and Harry Redknapp were in the final of I'm A Celebrity... South Africa.

headlines.title: Thousands at risk after multi-million dollar Everest flood warning system left to rust
headlines.description: The flood warning system at Imja glacial lake has not been maintained since 2016, fearful locals tell BBC.

headlines.title: 'Killing in prison is not difficult' - the rise in cold-blooded attacks behind bars
headlines.description: Is a culture of prisoners intimidating inmates into inflicting pain on others too normalised to change?

headlines.title: Heated Rivalry, The Housemaid and Fourth Wing: TikTok launches BookTok bestseller list
headlines.description: The inaugural top 20 is entirely made up of female authors, with Chloe Walsh appearing most frequently.

headlines.title: King's 'high stakes' visit with Trump will be toughest test yet of his reign
headlines.description: The state visit to the US looks fraught with difficulty - but could be key to rescuing the special relationship.

headlines.title: Touring is a costly struggle for bands like us. Now Harry Styles is helping
headlines.description: Ticket money from some stadium and arena gigs is helping support struggling grassroots artists and venues.

headlines.title: Meet the men calling out 'masculinity' trends
headlines.description: Influencers promoting looksmaxxing and narrow male beauty standards are being called out by a new wave of men on social media.

headlines.title: These American women had to move to Mexico to live with their undocumented husbands
headlines.description: The spouses of illegal immigrants facing deportation must choose between separation or moving to a new country.

headlines.title: Loud eaters and phones nearly spoiled my cinema trip - and it's not just me
headlines.description: Some people are being disruptive in cinemas - despite routine reminders to be considerate to others.

headlines.title: Who is making decisions in Iran?
headlines.description: Iran's new supreme leader is supposed to have the final say, but in practice the picture is far murkier.

headlines.title: Watch: 'A dangerous standoff' as Strait of Hormuz blockade continues
headlines.description: The US and Iran's rival blockades of the Strait of Hormuz have become a "test of wills", says Lyse Doucet.

headlines.title: Nato says 'no provision' to expel members after report US could seek to suspend Spain
headlines.description: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish allies over a perceived lack of support for Iran war.

headlines.title: Chris Mason: A grim week for Starmer – but things could be about to get worse
headlines.description: The Mandelson vetting row has reignited questions over the PM's future just two weeks before crucial elections in Scotland, Wales and England.

headlines.title: The Papers: 'Falklands tell Trump to back off' and 'Harry does a Diana'
headlines.description: Many of the papers lead on a leaked Pentagon memo, which suggests the US could back Argentine sovereignty of the Falklands.

headlines.title: Man extradited from Dubai over murder of woman found stabbed at London home
headlines.description: The London property manager, 27, who was also known as Angela, was stabbed in Westminster in 2024.

headlines.title: 'My living nightmare': Rob Reiner's son on how he found out parents were dead
headlines.description: Jake Reiner says the grief of his parents' brutal deaths and the arrest of his own brother left him in a "trance".

headlines.title: 31 sloths die in Florida before opening of attraction
headlines.description: Many died due to conditions at a Florida warehouse where they'd been shipped, while others arrived from South America dead, authorities say.

headlines.title: Scottish election 2026: Who should I vote for? Compare party policies
headlines.description: Explore the policies of the main parties in Scotland and compare where they stand on key issues with this interactive guide.

headlines.title: China car giant BYD says it can thrive without US
headlines.description: With the price of fuel rising China's BYD says it is positioning itself to benefit from the global shift away from fossil fuels.

headlines.title: 'Animals are traumatised too': Pet rescuers under fire in Ukraine
headlines.description: Animal rescue teams reveal the risks they take to rescue dogs, cats and other animals from the war in eastern Ukraine.

headlines.title: 'Very funny' statue of Monty Python's Terry Jones to be unveiled
headlines.description: Sir Michael Palin said his fellow Python star Jones would have found the statue "very funny indeed".

headlines.title: How Australians celebrate Anzac Day with a bit of gambling
headlines.description: Two-up is a coin toss betting game that was played by Australian soldiers during World War One - it’s now only legal across Australia on 25 April.

headlines.title: Zack Polanski calls for Trump to be 'kicked out' of his Scottish golf courses
headlines.description: Trump International responded calling the Greens leader an "imbecile" after he shared his personal opinion on the Holyrood campaign trail.

headlines.title: Watch: Couple who met on bus take double decker to their wedding
headlines.description: The pair are now married after meeting during their commute last summer.

headlines.title: 'My choir used my whale sound recordings to make a song celebrating the ocean'
headlines.description: A choir records a track using whale songs a member of the group helped gather in an Icelandic fjord.

headlines.title: Under-16s have their say on possible social media ban
headlines.description: Thirty three children discussed possible limits the government are considering on social media.

headlines.title: Grandfather says Britain's Got Talent duet with grandson was 'greatest moment'
headlines.description: The pair went from singing in care homes to the Britain's Got Talent stage.

headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Will another week of Starmer drama impact the elections?

headlines.title: All eyes on Spurs & West Ham? 'Unbelievable' Forest edge towards safety
headlines.description: After Nottingham Forest's stunning win at Sunderland, is the Premier League relegation battle now a two-horse race?

headlines.title: How Guardiola found his best Man City XI
headlines.description: Manchester City are finishing the season strongly - having looked at one stage as if the Premier League title may elude them. Here's how Pep Guardiola went through many systems to find his best team.

headlines.title: Welsh fire, England captain - how Meg Jones became a dual-nation icon
headlines.description: Swapping Welsh roots for the England captaincy could be enough to turn a nation against you. But Meg Jones is different.

headlines.title: 'Something special' - O'Sullivan & Higgins renew rivalry
headlines.description: Thirty years after their first match at the Crucible, 50-year-olds Ronnie O'Sullivan and John Higgins again go head-to-head on the biggest stage.

headlines.title: Why is Kelly not an automatic starter for Arsenal or England?
headlines.description: BBC Sport discusses why Lionesses hero Chloe Kelly is not guaranteed a spot for club or country.

headlines.title: Ramsey's marathon in memory of 'amazing' young boy
headlines.description: Aaron Ramsey has only just retired but is running the London Marathon in memory of his friend Ceri's "amazing" son Hugh, who died of a rare cancer aged six.

headlines.title: How Newcastle's 'bullies' became too nice
headlines.description: How Eddie Howe's Newcastle have gone from regularly ruffling feathers to losing 15 Premier League games this season.
